channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: ‘Vengeance for all’: How Iran’s Lego videos won narrative war against Trump
item.description: The viral videos by Iranian creators, say analysts, are high-quality though cheap, and hit fissures in US politics.

item.title: Why are anti-war protests in the West muted on Iran?
item.description: Despite global opposition, Iran war protests lag behind Gaza and Ukraine, shaped by fatigue, fear and disillusionment.

item.title: Trump calls war on Iran a ‘little diversion’
item.description: US President Donald Trump has described the war on Iran which has killed more than 2,000 people as a ‘little diversion’.

item.title: Iran war live: Ceasefire starts in Lebanon as Trump says Tehran deal close
item.description: Death toll from Israeli attacks on Lebanon reached 2,196 on Thursday as 10-day ceasefire announced.

item.title: Displaced Lebanese wary as ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah begins
item.description: Tensions linger as evacuees await clarity on the ceasefire’s terms before risking a return to war-torn villages.

item.title: Turkiye grieves students killed in school shooting
item.description: Hundreds turned out to the funerals of eight students who were fatally shot at school in Turkiye’s Kahramanmaras.

item.title: What we know about the ceasefire between Lebanon and Israel
item.description: A 10-day truce between the two countries is now in effect, with Iran-backed Hezbollah voicing support, as negotiations continue between the US and Iran.

item.title: Turkish police detain 162 people over online posts about school shootings
item.description: At least 16 people were injured in a shooting at a high school on Tuesday, before another nine were killed in a separate school shooting on Wednesday.

item.title: Russia launches deadliest aerial attack in months, killing 18 in Ukraine
item.description: A Ukrainian drone attack killed two people in Russia, Moscow says, after an Orthodox Easter truce.

item.title: Satellite images reveal scale of Israeli demolitions as Lebanese villages destroyed
item.description: BBC Verify analysis found more than 1,400 buildings had been destroyed since 2 March.
